Expect strict containment between the 675 structural anchor and 680 Call Wall, with an underlying gravitational pull toward 671 Max Pain unless broad market forces trigger a gamma trap.

However, extreme bearish skew and heavy Call Walls overhead create strong resistance, while robust Put OI forms a concrete floor.

Heavy Call OI in 0DTE (11.9k) and WEEKLY (7.0k). Acts as an immediate short-term ceiling that dealers will defend to prevent gamma expansion.
Massive volume friction in 0DTE (59k volume) and major Call OI in WEEKLY (10.5k). Acts as a sticky support level due to dealer hedging.
